Package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.api.tmpl

@JStachePath(prefix="templates/", suffix=".mustache") package dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.api.tmpl
Contexts for API template.

    Description
    dk.mada.jaxrs.generator.api
    Generation of API classes.

    Description
    CtxApi
    Context passed to Mustache when compiling an api.
    CtxApi.CtxOperationExternalDoc
    External documentation reference.

    Extended template data for a resource class.
